Table of Contents

Enum esriTimeStringFormat

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Esri time string formats.

[Guid("85F977F2-1AF5-4A2E-BFEA-F27FB793F2DF")]
public enum esriTimeStringFormat

Fields

esriTSFYearOnly = 18

18: yyyy

esriTSFYearThruDay = 16

16: yyyyMMdd

esriTSFYearThruDayWithDash = 10

10: yyyy-MM-dd

esriTSFYearThruDayWithSlash = 4

4: yyyy/MM/dd

esriTSFYearThruHour = 15

15: yyyyMMddHH

esriTSFYearThruHourWithDash = 9

9: yyyy-MM-dd HH

esriTSFYearThruHourWithSlash = 3

3: yyyy/MM/dd HH

esriTSFYearThruMinute = 14

14: yyyyMMddHHmm

esriTSFYearThruMinuteWithDash = 8

8: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm

esriTSFYearThruMinuteWithSlash = 2

2: yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm

esriTSFYearThruMonth = 17

17: yyyyMM

esriTSFYearThruMonthWithDash = 11

11: yyyy-MM

esriTSFYearThruMonthWithSlash = 5

5: yyyy/MM

esriTSFYearThruSecond = 13

13: yyyyMMddHHmmss

esriTSFYearThruSecondWithDash = 7

7: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss

esriTSFYearThruSecondWithSlash = 1

1: yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss

esriTSFYearThruSubSecond = 12

12: yyyyMMddHHmmss.s

esriTSFYearThruSubSecondWithDash = 6

6: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.s

esriTSFYearThruSubSecondWithSlash = 0

0: yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss.s

esriTSF_ECMAISO8601Z = 22

22: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.sssZ

esriTSF_ISOThruSecond = 21

21: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss

esriTSF_ISOThruSubSecond = 20

20: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.s

esriTSF_ISOThruSubSecondZ = 19

19: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.sZ
